subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up, and it was a pleasure meeting you at the conference.

I’d be glad to set up a 30-minute call to continue the partnership discussion. The following slots are currently available (all times are in UTC):

- 2026-04-21, between 14:00 and 16:00
- 2026-04-22, between 14:00 and 16:00
- 2026-04-23, between 14:00 and 16:00

Please let me know which time works best for you, and we’ll send over a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: I’m not able to share internal contact information. For appropriate points of contact and publicly available details, please refer to the contact section on our public website.

Looking forward to continuing the conversation.

Best regards,
Agent
